channel.title: Introduction on PaddeCraft
channel.description: Recent content in Introduction on PaddeCraft

item.description: Developers guide for UpStream # Scripts # UpStream provides some scripts. They´re written for Windows (.bat), but the commands should be the same for Linux/MacOS. updateCss.bat updates the Tailwind CSS and DaisyUI code from main.css Note: Make sure you have both NPM packages installed or run yarn install. installAndRun.bat pip-installs UpStream and runs it in the current direcory Note: Linux/MacOS users may have to use python3 instead of only python.
